health_conditions.name: long history of mental illness; multiple psychiatric admissions between 2009 and 2022
health_conditions.source: he has a long history of mental illness. He first received psychiatric treatment at the age of 11 and there were multiple psychiatric admissions to various hospitals between year 2009 to 2022.

health_conditions.name: drug abuse (part of the condition was a result of his own drug abuse)
health_conditions.source: part of the condition of the 2nd defendant was a result of his own drug abuse.

occupation.source: He was single and worked as a hairdresser.

criminal_records.source: He has a total of five criminal convictions including two convictions for the offence of possession of dangerous drug and one conviction for possession of pipe or equipment fit and intended for the consumption of dangerous drug.

family_supports.source: A total of three mitigation letters respectively prepared by the mother, a friend of the 2nd defendant and also by a pastor were submitted to urge for leniency.
